stages.name: Pixel Health Audit
stages.description: Complete audit and repair of all tracking pixels across platforms
milestones: GTM container & consent-flow audit (GA4, Meta, TikTok, Pinterest)
Map current Shopify data layer events vs. platform requirements
Identify and document all missing / broken event triggers
Deliver prioritized remediation punch-list

stages.name: Core Data Infrastructure
stages.description: Build foundation for unified data collection and storage
milestones: Deploy server-side GTM container on GCP / Stape for first-party data routing
Configure Conversions API for Meta & TikTok (server events)
Pipe raw event stream into BigQuery (landing dataset)
Validate end-to-end pixel + CAPI deduplication in each ad platform

stages.name: Data Modeling & Activation
stages.description: Transform raw data into actionable business models
milestones: Build dbt project: staging → intermediate → mart models
Implement customer spine table (golden customer_id across sources)
Create standard eCommerce metrics mart (orders, LTV, cohort, product)
Publish first Looker Studio / BI dashboard suite (Exec, Marketing, Ops)

stages.name: Advanced Analytics & ML
milestones: Deploy first-party audience builder → ad-platform upload automation
Integrate cost data (ads, influencers) for blended ROAS mart
Implement incrementality / MMM baseline (Robyn or Meridian)
Stand up experiment framework for paid-media hold-out tests

stages.name: Real-Time & Optimization
milestones: Streaming pipeline (Pub/Sub → BigQuery real-time)
Propensity-based retargeting / suppression in ad platforms
ML-powered budget pacing alerts + anomaly detection
Self-serve analytics portal for cross-functional teams

stages.name: Attribution Foundation
stages.description: Establish baseline attribution and UTM governance
milestones: Standardize UTM taxonomy across all paid & owned channels
Deploy first-touch / last-touch attribution in GA4 + BigQuery
Build weekly channel-mix report with CPA, ROAS, CAC by source
Document data dictionary for marketing KPIs

stages.name: Channel Deep-Dives
milestones: Meta: breakdown reporting (age, gender, placement, creative)
TikTok / Pinterest: creative-performance heatmaps
Email / SMS: click-to-purchase funnel with cohort overlay
Influencer: unique code + UTM tracking → revenue reconciliation

stages.name: Incrementality & Testing
milestones: Run first geo hold-out or conversion-lift study
Integrate incrementality results into budget re-allocation model
Automate creative fatigue alerts (CTR / CPA decay thresholds)
Launch multivariate creative testing framework

stages.name: Full-Funnel Optimization
milestones: Map customer journey paths (awareness → repeat purchase)
Build LTV:CAC dashboard segmented by first-order SKU / promo
Integrate offline / call-center conversions (if applicable)
Shift bidding to predicted-LTV audiences in Meta & Google

stages.name: Autonomous Marketing Engine
milestones: Deploy ML-based bid & budget pacing agents
Auto-generate creative variants from product feed + brand assets
Predictive CAC alerts + headroom modeling
Real-time contribution-margin dashboards by channel & campaign

stages.name: Baseline Retention Metrics
milestones: Calculate cohort retention curves (M1-M12 repurchase %)
Segment customers: 1x vs. 2x vs. 3+ buyers
Identify top SKUs that drive second purchase
Document current ESP / SMS flows & performance

stages.name: Lifecycle Automation
stages.description: Behavioral flows across email, SMS, and site
milestones: Implement post-purchase replenishment flow (timed to product use)
Launch churn-risk reactivation flow (60 / 90 day lapsed)
Build win-back campaign with progressive discounting
Sync on-site banners / pop-ups to ESP segment triggers

stages.name: Subscription & LTV Drivers
stages.description: Recurring revenue and high-LTV customer programs
milestones: Launch / optimize Subscribe-&-Save program analytics
Build LTV model: RFM + predicted next-order date
Deploy referral program tracking → ROI by referrer tier
Integrate loyalty program data with customer spine

stages.name: Predictive Retention
stages.description: ML models to pre-empt churn and personalize CX
milestones: Train churn-propensity model (pre-lapse intervention)
Personalize email / SMS cadence based on engagement score
Dynamic product recommendations in lifecycle flows
Build cohort-level forecasting model for inventory planning

stages.name: 1-to-1 Personalization Engine
milestones: Real-time website personalization (returning visitor journeys)
Next-best-action engine for CSRs / chat
Predictive reorder timing with auto-triggered outreach
Unified customer profile accessible across all touchpoints

stages.name: Executive Reporting
stages.description: Standardized P&L and KPI visibility for leadership
milestones: Build executive dashboard (Revenue, GM, Ad Spend, CAC, LTV)
Automate weekly / monthly reporting cadence
Define North Star metric & supporting KPIs
Align finance & marketing on contribution-margin methodology

stages.name: Financial Analytics
milestones: Integrate Shopify + ad cost + COGS data for P&L by channel
Build customer-level profitability model
Scenario planner: ad spend ↔ revenue ↔ margin trade-offs
Deliver quarterly business review (QBR) analytics pack

stages.name: Forecasting & Planning
milestones: Implement rolling 12-month revenue forecast model
Build promo impact model (discount depth vs. margin erosion)
Create annual planning templates linked to live data
Integrate inventory / supply chain signals into demand plan

stages.name: Strategic Analytics
milestones: Pricing elasticity analysis by SKU / bundle
Build TAM / SAM / SOM models for new market evaluation
Competitive intelligence dashboard (SOV, pricing, promo)
Integrate external data (macro trends, search volume)

stages.name: AI-Assisted Decision Engine
milestones: Natural-language query layer for executive self-service
Automated anomaly detection & root-cause analysis
Prescriptive recommendations (pricing, assortment, media mix)
Board-ready insights generated from live data

stages.name: Operational Visibility
stages.description: Baseline metrics for fulfillment and inventory
milestones: Dashboard: order-to-ship time, fulfillment rate, return rate
Inventory turnover & weeks-of-supply metrics
Map current 3PL / WMS data feeds
Identify data gaps (inventory sync lag, SKU mismatches)

stages.name: Inventory Analytics
milestones: Build ABC analysis + slow-mover identification
Reorder-point automation based on sales velocity
Connect demand forecast to inventory planning
Dead-stock markdown recommendation engine

stages.name: Supply Chain Intelligence
milestones: Vendor scorecard (lead time, quality, cost variance)
Landed cost model (COGs + freight + duties)
Integrate PO and receiving data for inbound visibility
Build scenario model for multi-node fulfillment

stages.name: Predictive Operations
stages.description: ML-powered demand sensing and exception handling
milestones: Demand-sensing model (incorporate promo, seasonality, trends)
Automated safety-stock optimization
Proactive exception alerts (stock-outs, overstock, delays)
Integrate CX data (returns reasons) into quality loop

stages.name: Autonomous Supply Chain
milestones: Auto-replenishment triggers from forecast + POS signals
Dynamic carrier / fulfillment node selection
Real-time cost-to-serve model per order
Closed-loop feedback: sales ↔ inventory ↔ procurement
